original_query: SELECT "t0"."SAL" + "t1"."COMM" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO" = 10 AS "EXPR0" FROM "EMP") AS "t0" INNER JOIN (SELECT "ENAME", "COMM" FROM "BONUS") AS "t1" ON "t0"."ENAME" = "t1"."ENAME" AND "t0"."EXPR0"
rewritten_query: SELECT "t0"."SAL" + "t1"."COMM" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO" = 10 AS "EXPR0" FROM "EMP") AS "t0" INNER JOIN (SELECT "ENAME", "COMM" FROM "BONUS") AS "t1" ON "t0"."ENAME" = "t1"."ENAME" AND "t0"."EXPR0"

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed unnecessary subqueries and replaced them with direct table references
Moved the DEPTNO = 10 condition from the join condition to the WHERE clause for early filtering
Simplified the join condition to only include the ENAME equality
